resultList.dtldesc: Experience the epitome of modern living with this exquisite 2 BHK flat for sale in Pristine Pavilion Phase 2, Mahindra World City, Chennai. This captivating property is thoughtfully designed to be vaastu compliant, ensuring harmony and positivity in your living space.Property SpecificationsBoasting a super area of 609 sqft, this delightful flat is situated on the 9th floor of a well-maintained 9-storeyed building. The flat features a common bathroom, designed with modern western-style amenities, and provisions for a geyser. Unwind in the separate living and dining area, thoughtfully designed to accommodate cozy gatherings and memorable moments with loved ones.The modular kitchen is equipped with cabinets, a granite platform, and a sink, creating a functional and elegant space for culinary endeavours. The flat is adorned with vitrified flooring, adding to its elegance and easy maintenance.Facilities This property offers convenient open parking, 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, and enhanced security with a dedicated security guard and CCTV installations throughout the premises. Additionally, residents can enjoy the convenience of two lifts and a host of amenities, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, rainwater harvesting, reserved parking, water storage, intercom facility, maintenance staff, waste disposal, internetWi-Fi connectivity, RO water system, flower gardens, kids play area, library, business center, cycling  jogging track, and fire fighting equipment.LocalityThe location of this flat is truly advantageous, with Mahindra World City itself serving as a nearby landmark, enhancing its accessibility and recognition. Reputable schools and hospitals are within a 3km radius, catering to educational and healthcare needs. Banks and ATMs are also conveniently accessible, providing essential financial services. Paranur Railway Station is within 5km, further enhancing accessibility to transportation hubs.
